'''A Traveler's Journals of Ralltiir''' is an online supplement for the ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]'' released on the [[Wizards of the Coast]] [[Wizards.com|website]] on [[January 2]], [[2003]], as part of the site's ''[[Planet Hoppers]]'' series. It was written by [[Morrie Mullins (real person)|Morrie Mullins]].

The supplement was split into five separate articles, focusing on the adventures of [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] explorer [[Vareesa Enan]] on [[Ralltiir/Legends|Ralltiir]] around the time of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Contents==
===Part 1: World of Watchers===
''…our hero, the wide-eyed [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] [[Vareesa Enan]], arrives on the world of [[Ralltiir/Legends|Ralltiir]], describes its architecture, and perhaps falls prey to many pairs of watchful [[Eye/Legends|eyes]].''<ref name="Ralltiir" />

===Part 2: The Wayward Ithorian===
''…our hero, Vareesa Enan, finds a comrade in a wayward Ithorian named [[Kikow]], a secret smuggler looking to carve out his own piece of Ralltiir's criminal underworld.''<ref name="Ralltiir" />

===Part 3: Exhibition===
''…our hero, Vareesa Enan, learns of the astonishing archive of knowledge in the capital city's Exploration Auditorium, and takes note of a meeting between Kikow and a shaven-shouldered [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] name [[Furellas]].''<ref name="Ralltiir" />

===Part 4: The Ithorian and the Tiger===
''…our hero, Vareesa Enan, is delighted to receive a gift from Furellas -- a baby [[Ralltiir tiger]]. If only he knew that the cute little feline will quickly grow into a vicious [[Death/Legends|killer]] given over to bouts of [[Blood/Legends|blood]] madness.''<ref name="Ralltiir" />

===Part 5: The Kalmec===
''…our hero, Vareesa Enan, prepares to leave Ralltiir with his new pet, and shares his observations on the strange Wookiee organization to which Furellas belongs -- the [[Kalmec]].''<ref name="Ralltiir" />
